task_completion.description: The file is saved with the correct name and path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the ActivInspire window title showing 'algorithm_flowchart.flipchart' or a file manager showing the file in the '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/' directory.
Look at the page browser panel or the page indicator in ActivInspire showing exactly 2 pages (e.g., 'Page 1 of 2' or 'Page 2 of 2').

task_completion.description: Page 1 contains the 'Flowchart Symbols' key with required labels.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text on Page 1 matching 'Flowchart Symbols', 'Start / End', 'Process', and 'Decision'.

task_completion.description: Page 2 contains the 'Morning Routine Algorithm' text.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text on Page 2 matching 'Morning Routine Algorithm', 'Alarm', 'Weekday', and 'Sleep' (or similar terms like 'Get Up' and 'Sleep In').

task_completion.description: Oval, rectangle, and diamond shapes are used in the flipchart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the presence of oval, rectangle, and diamond shapes drawn on the canvas across the pages.

task_completion.description: Lines or connectors are used to connect shapes on Page 2.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for lines or arrows connecting the shapes on Page 2 to form a logical flowchart.

integrity.description: The agent used the ActivInspire application to create the flipchart.
integrity.visual_evidence: The ActivInspire GUI (tools, menus, canvas) should be visible in the screenshots.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or scripts to generate the flipchart file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows showing script execution or file manipulation commands to bypass the GUI.

integrity.description: The shapes and text are genuinely placed on the ActivInspire canvas.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for selection handles on shapes/text or the active use of ActivInspire tools (text tool, shape tool) rather than pasting a pre-made image.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The file must be saved as 'algorithm_flowchart.flipchart' in '/home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/'. The flipchart must have exactly 2 pages. Required text includes 'Symbols', 'Start', 'Process', 'Decision', 'Morning', 'Alarm', 'Weekday', and 'Sleep'. Required shapes include rectangle, oval, diamond, and line/connector.
